name: poser-pipeline
description: End-to-end POSER (Physics Object Spectrum and Energy Research) pipeline: ingestion, extraction, analysis, and report generation.

inputs.manuscript_pdf_path: Absolute path to the manuscript PDF.
inputs.fit_input_csv_path: Path to the fit input data. Default: /mnt/host/aisci/physics/data/fit_input.csv

hard_constraints: Do not proceed past ingestion if fit_input.csv is missing (B-01 gate).
No physical interpretation of fit parameters before all diagnostic evidence is gathered.
Do not write to the canonical evidence ledger automatically.

steps.name: ingestion
steps.prompt: Execute Stage 1 (poser-ingest). Verify {{manuscript_pdf_path}} and {{fit_input_csv_path}}. Run formula classification.

steps.name: extraction
steps.prompt: Execute Stage 2 (poser-extract). Validate schema and run symbolic/Jacobian checks.

steps.name: analysis
steps.prompt: Execute Stage 3 (poser-analyse). Run the fitting pipeline for {{manuscript_pdf_path}} using data from {{fit_input_csv_path}}.

steps.name: content_generation
steps.prompt: Execute Stage 4 (poser-report). Generate the structured analysis report and export bundle.
